summary: Australia’s sovereign debt manager should bolster staffing and consider lowering its large cash buffer to maintain best-practice as issuances grow, according to an independent Treasury-commissioned review that outlined potential risks to the nation’s funding strategy.

title_cn: 波罗的海国家敦促盟友不要对俄罗斯手软

title: Funders Commit $1.3 Billion to Zambia Critical-Minerals Railway
title_cn: 资助者承诺向赞比亚关键矿产铁路投资 13 亿美元
summary: The Africa Finance Corp. and the African Development Bank committed $500 million each to a railway that will connect Zambia’s copper mines to global markets through the Angolan port of Lobito.

title: Read Japan Finance Minister Katayama’s Full Remarks at Bloomberg New Voices
title_cn: 阅读日本财务大臣片山在彭博新声音上的完整讲话
summary: The following is a transcript of Japanese Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama’s remarks at the Bloomberg New Voices 2026 event in Tokyo on April 23 in conversation with anchor Shery Ahn.

title: Oil Gains on Iran Stalemate, Tech Stocks Advance: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 伊朗僵局导致石油上涨，科技股上涨：市场结束
summary: Oil rose for a fifth day as concerns grew that the US and Iran were making little progress toward resuming talks on de-escalation, keeping the Strait of Hormuz effectively closed.

title: Full Interview: Japan’s Katayama on Constant Close Contact With US on FX
title_cn: 完整采访：日本片山谈与美国在外汇问题上持续密切接触
summary: Japanese Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama says that she is in close communication with the US on FX. Katayama spoke exclusively with Shery Ahn at the Bloomberg New Voices 2026 event in Tokyo. (Around 5:40 and 7:30, Katayama references a currency cooperation agreement with the US in 2024. The deal was in 2025.)  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stock Futures Fall and Pound Steadies as Iran Talks Stall
title_cn: 由于伊朗谈判陷入僵局，股票期货下跌，英镑稳定

title: Behind the 40,000% Stock Surge That’s Mystifying Traders in Turkey
title_cn: 令土耳其交易者困惑的股市飙升 40,000% 的背后
summary: At first, it was just a curiosity in Turkey’s financial circles: An obscure brokerage firm with a stock that went up and up.

title: India Cranks Up Output to Cope With Enduring Cooking Gas Crisis
title_cn: 印度提高产量以应对持久的烹饪天然气危机
summary: India’s government is leaning on its refineries to survive an acute shortage of cooking gas as the war in Iran drags on, while also scouring the world for additional suppliers and nudging consumers toward alternatives.

title: Oil Holds Gains as Iran Talks Impasse Adds to Uncertainty
title_cn: 伊朗谈判僵局增加不确定性，油价保持上涨
summary: Oil held a four-day gain as uncertainty over talks between the US and Iran threatened to further delay flows from the Persian Gulf.

title: Insight with Haslinda Amin 4/24/2026
title_cn: 哈斯琳达·阿明的见解 4/24/2026
summary: Insight with Haslinda Amin, a daily news program featuring in-depth, high-profile interviews and analysis to give viewers the complete picture on the stories that matter. The show features prominent leaders spanning the worlds of business, finance, politics and culture. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ADP Cuts Stake in India’s GMR Airports in $1 Billion Deal
title_cn: ADP 以 10 亿美元的交易削减印度 GMR 机场的股份
summary: ADP, the operator of the main Paris airports, agreed to sell up to 7.3% of India’s GMR Airports Ltd. as part of a deal worth as much as €924 million ($1.08 billion).

title: TSMC Shares Surge as Taiwan Lifts Single-Stock Limit for Funds
title_cn: 台湾取消基金单股限制 台积电股价飙升
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. shares climbed to a record after Taiwan’s financial regulator eased limits on single-stock fund holdings, a move that JPMorgan Chase & Co. said could draw more than $6 billion of inflows.

title: Iran Talks Waver Amid Trump’s Messaging Blitz
title_cn: 伊朗谈判在特朗普的信息闪电战中动摇
summary: Bloomberg's Stephen Stapczynski and Stuart Livingstone-Wallace share the latest as the US-Iran truce approaches two weeks. They warring sides are in a standoff over how to proceed to talks to end the conflict, which has killed thousands of people, wreaked havoc across the Middle East and sent energy prices soaring. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Volkswagen's Cisek on China Business
title_cn: 大众汽车集团首席执行官西塞克谈中国业务
summary: Volkswagen is accelerating its China strategy by deepening partnerships with local technology and electric vehicle makers, including Xpeng, as it faces intensifying competition and a prolonged price war. The company is pushing greater localisation across manufacturing, R&D and product development to shorten vehicle cycles and cut costs. The strategy comes as China’s auto market shifts toward replacement buyers and faster innovation, putting pressure on foreign carmakers to adapt quickly. Robert Cisek, Passenger Cars Brand China CEO at Volkswagen, spoke with Stephen Engle on Insight with Haslinda Amin from the Beijing Auto Show. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China’s First Special Bond Sale of the Year Draws Strong Demand
title_cn: 中国今年首次特别债券发行需求强劲
summary: China saw strong demand at its first ultra-long special bond sale of the year, with 30-year yields reaching the lowest level since November.

title: Graticule Levinson on Likely Iran Outcomes and AI Rally
title_cn: Graticule Levinson 谈伊朗可能的结果和人工智能集会
summary: Adam Levinson of Graticule Asset Management Asia discussed on Insight with Haslinda Amin about possible outcomes for Iran and the outlook for AI, and how it’s time to buy the dip to catch what’s “unequivocally the greatest hardware cycle of all time.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Africa's Karoo Region Bets on Pistachio Boom
title_cn: 南非卡鲁地区押注开心果繁荣
summary:
Pistachio prices have surged to multi-year highs as the war in Iran tightens supply. Now, South Africa’s Karoo region is stepping into the spotlight, as farmers bet they can carve out a place in a market long dominated by a handful of producers. Bloomberg's Jennifer Zabasajja reports.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: KKR, Capital Group to Start Public-Private Credit Fund in Asia
title_cn: KKR 与资本集团将在亚洲设立公私信贷基金
summary: KKR & Co. and Capital Group plan to launch a public-private credit fund in Asia this year, in the latest tie-up between private-markets specialists and traditional asset managers seeking to attract more retail money.

title: Seres on Impact of Middle East War
title_cn: 塞雷斯谈中东战争的影响
summary: Seres Group President Jonn Zhang discusses how the company is managing risks to its overseas expansion plans, particularly in the Middle East. He speaks to Bloomberg's Stephen Engle at the Beijing Auto Show.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BlackRock iShares: Market Volatility Boosts ETF Use
title_cn: BlackRock iShares：市场波动促进 ETF 使用
summary: Nicholas Peach, APAC Head of iShares at BlackRock, says investors have been using ETFs to express their sentiment amid rapid market-moving news cycles. He speaks on Bloomberg's ETF IQ Asia. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China's FAW on Modernization and Expansion Plans
title_cn: 中国一汽的现代化和扩张计划
summary: Giles Taylor, VP of Global Design & Chief Creative Officer at FAW Group, discusses the shakedown he expects in the auto sector as the Chinese state-owned carmaker seeks to modernize itself. He speaks to Bloomberg's Stephen Engle at the Beijing Auto Show.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Base Metals Slide as Iran Uncertainty Keeps Pressure on Prices
title_cn: 由于伊朗的不确定性给价格带来压力，基本金属下滑
summary: Copper headed for a weekly loss, tracked by other metals, as uncertainty over the next developments in the Middle East war continued to weigh on the global economy.

title: SBI Funds Is Said to Start Marketing $1.5 Billion IPO Next Week
title_cn: 据称 SBI 基金将于下周开始营销 15 亿美元的 IPO
summary: SBI Funds Management Ltd. is set to begin formal marketing as early as next week for its planned initial public offering to raise as much as $1.5 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Central Asia Gains as War Shakes Energy Markets and Trade Routes
title_cn: 战争动摇能源市场和贸易路线，中亚受益
summary: Central Asia, once treated as a geopolitical backwater, is seizing the spotlight as international capital flows and foreign powers compete for access to its vast mineral and energy wealth.

title: ECB to Hike in June Before Reversing Course in 2027, Poll Shows
title_cn: 民意调查显示，欧洲央行将在 6 月加息，然后在 2027 年扭转路线
summary: The European Central Bank will respond to the Iran war by raising interest rates once — in June — before reversing the move next year to protect economic growth, analysts say.

title: US-Sanctioned Supertanker With Iranian Oil Tries Hormuz Transit
title_cn: 美国制裁的载有伊朗石油的超级油轮尝试霍尔木兹过境
summary: A US-sanctioned supertanker laden with Iranian oil appeared to be attempting to cross the Strait of Hormuz on Friday, with traffic through the waterway otherwise at a virtual standstill.

title: Geely Senior VP Yang on Business Outlook
title_cn: 吉利高级副总裁杨先生谈业务展望
summary:
Victor Yang, Senior VP of Zhejiang Geely, discusses the business impact of geopolitics and automaker's outlook for growth.
He speaks with Bloomberg's Stephen Engle on the sidelines of the annual Beijing Auto Show on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Rises on Iran Talks Stalemate; Katayama Talks Yen | The Asia Trade 4/24/2026
title_cn: 伊朗谈判陷入僵局，油价上涨；片山谈日元|亚洲贸易 2026 年 4 月 24 日
summary: "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SNB Move Below Zero Bigger Step Than Normal Cut, Schlegel Tells NZZ
title_cn: 施莱格尔告诉NZZ，瑞士央行降息至零以下的幅度比正常降息幅度更大
summary: Swiss National Bank President Martin Schlegel said cutting borrowing costs below zero is a more significant move than a reduction above that level, according to an interview in Neue Zuercher Zeitung.

title: Victory Giant Surges in Debut After Biggest Hong Kong Listing This Year
title_cn: 胜利巨人今年最大的香港上市后首次亮相
summary: Victory Giant Technology Huizhou Co., a Chinese supplier to Nvidia Corp., surged 50% in its Hong Kong trading debut after raising $2.6 billion in the city’s largest listing in seven months.

title: Lightelligence Is Said Set to Price HK IPO at Top of Range
title_cn: 据称 Lightelligence 将香港 IPO 定价定为区间顶部
summary: Chinese optical-computing company Lightelligence is poised to price its oversubscribed Hong Kong initial public offering at the top of the marketed range, according to people familiar with the matter, signaling hot demand for components used in the artificial-intelligence buildout.

title: Philippines Looks to Follow Australia's Social Media Ban
title_cn: 菲律宾希望效仿澳大利亚的社交媒体禁令
summary: Philippine Senator Win Gatchalian discusses his push to enact social media policies similar to those in Australia, in an effort to protect minors from excessive use and mental health harm. He speaks with Shery Ahn on “Bloomberg Tech: Asia.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Should Social Media Be Regulated Like Cigarettes?
title_cn: 社交媒体是否应该像香烟一样受到监管？
summary: Ravi Iyer, Managing Director at USC Marshall School Neely Center, discusses the sociological impact of social media addiction on young people. He says millions of kids in the US are already seeing negative impact to their health, and existing safeguards are not enough. He speaks with Shery Ahn on “Bloomberg Tech: Asia.”  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: DeepSeek Unveils Flagship AI Model a Year After Breakthrough
title_cn: DeepSeek 在突破一年后推出旗舰人工智能模型
summary: DeepSeek rolled out preview versions of a new flagship artificial intelligence model a year after upending Silicon Valley, calling it the most powerful open-source platform in a challenge to rivals from OpenAI to Anthropic PBC.

title: Victory Giant Founder on $2.6B HK Listing, AI
title_cn: Victory Giant 创始人在 $2.6B 香港上市，AI
summary: Victory Giant Technology Huizhou Co. surged in its Hong Kong trading debut on Tuesday, after raising $2.6 billion. Ahead of the company’s listing, founder Chen Tao told Bloomberg that the printed circuit board maker expects “high-speed growth” over the next five years.

title: Infosys Sales Forecast Trails Estimates as IT Demand Sputters
title_cn: IT 需求下滑，Infosys 销售预测低于预期
summary: Infosys Ltd. forecast sales growth for this year below analysts’ estimates, as global enterprises curtail spending on large information technology projects to prepare for geopolitical and economic challenges.

title: Tencent Unveils AI Model in High-Stakes Test for OpenAI Hire
title_cn: 腾讯在 OpenAI Hire 高风险测试中推出 AI 模型
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. revealed a major upgrade to its foundational model, marking the first high-stakes test for China’s most valuable company to assert its place in a frenetic AI race since it recruited a top researcher from OpenAI.

title: Will Social Media Bans Actually Work? | Bloomberg Tech: Asia 4/24/2026
title_cn: 社交媒体禁令真的有效吗？ |彭博科技：亚洲 2026 年 4 月 24 日
summary:
As concerns grow over the dangers of social media, more and more countries face the challenging task of balancing exposure to addictive algorithms with free speech.

In this episode of Bloomberg: Tech Asia, Shery Ahn speaks with Philippine Senator Win Gatchalian, social psychologist Ravi Iyer, and Bloomberg Opinion's Catherine Thorbecke about the global push to regulate social platforms, and whether bans can truly make a difference. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Canon Shares Drop by Most in a Year After Memory Costs Bite
title_cn: 内存成本上涨导致佳能股价一年来跌幅最大
summary: Canon shares suffered their steepest decline in a year after the camera maker cut its outlook below estimates on soaring memory prices, a harbinger of more pain in the electronics sector ahead.

title: China’s Carmakers Grab 30% of Europe’s Plug-In Hybrid Sales
title_cn: 中国汽车制造商占据欧洲插电式混合动力车销量的30%
summary: Chinese automakers made strong inroads into Europe last month as consumers rushed to buy more affordable plug-in hybrids from brands led by BYD Co.

title: AI Coding Firm Cognition in Funding Talks at $25 Billion Value
title_cn: AI 编码公司 Cognition 参与价值 250 亿美元的融资谈判
summary: Cognition AI Inc. is in early talks to raise a new round of funding that would more than double its valuation to $25 billion, according to people familiar with the matter, tapping into increased demand for companies that understand how to use artificial intelligence in software development.

title: Stocks Fall on Iran Jitters, Intel Delivers Earnings Beat | The Close 4/23/2026
title_cn: 伊朗紧张局势导致股市下跌，英特尔公布业绩好于预期收盘价 2026 年 4 月 23 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Creditsights’ Zachary Griffiths, McKinsey’s Kate Smaje, Jefferies’ John Hecht, Raymond James CEO Paul Shoukry, Zscaler CEO Jay Chaudhry, Janus Henderson Investors’ Michael Contopoulos, CFRA Research’s Angelo Zino, Great Hill Capital’s Thomas Hayes, PIMCO’s Libby Cantrill, Stifel CEO Ron Kruszewski, & Former NFL Network & ESPN CEO Steve Bornstein. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Intel Gives Strong AI-Fueled Outlook, Sending Shares Soaring
title_cn: 英特尔给出强劲的人工智能驱动前景，推动股价飙升
summary: Intel Corp. delivered a blockbuster sales forecast that shattered Wall Street expectations, signaling that the long-struggling chipmaker is benefiting from the giant build-out of artificial intelligence computing.

title: The Potential Peril and Profit of Anthropic’s Mythos
title_cn: 人择神话的潜在危险和利润
summary: The artificial intelligence model has sparked fear on Wall Street. But the furor could eventually benefit its maker.

title: The Key Takeaways From Intel's Q1 Earnings and Forecast
title_cn: 英特尔第一季度收益和预测的主要要点
summary: Intel Corp. gave a strong sales forecast for the current period, signaling that the struggling chipmaker is finally beginning to benefit from the giant build-out of artificial intelligence infrastructure. Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow breaks down the numbers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why Anthropic’s Mythos Is Sparking Alarm
title_cn: 为什么 Anthropic 的神话引起了警惕
summary:
Mythos has sparked fear as AI may be advancing faster than it can be safely deployed. But the furor may benefit Anthropic, the model’s owner, as it sees potential valuations approaching $800 billion.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SoftBank Prepares to Manufacture Batteries for AI Data Centers
title_cn: 软银准备为人工智能数据中心制造电池
summary: SoftBank Group Corp.’s mobile unit plans to transform part of its factory in Osaka into one of Japan’s biggest production lines for large-scale batteries in an ambitious attempt at powering its own AI data centers.

title: $900,000 Korean Chip Sector Bonuses Show K-Shaped Economy Risks
title_cn: 韩国芯片行业 90 万美元奖金显示 K 型经济风险
summary: In South Korea’s booming chip sector, bonuses that bullish forecasts suggest could soon approach $900,000 are deepening concerns over widening inequality.

title: ServiceNow Stock Has Worst Day Ever on Disappointing Sales
title_cn: ServiceNow 股票经历了有史以来最糟糕的一天，销售令人失望
summary: ServiceNow Inc. shares plunged the most ever after the provider of software for business tasks reported results that disappointed investors and said some sales deals have been delayed by the war in the Middle East.

title: Texas Instruments Rises the Most Since 2000 on Rosy Forecast
title_cn: 乐观预测下，德州仪器 (TI) 股价创下 2000 年以来最大涨幅
summary: Texas Instruments Inc. shares jumped the most in more than a quarter-century after the chipmaker gave a surprisingly strong forecast, helped by booming spending on data centers and industrial equipment.

title: Bezos’ Physical AI Lab Has Closed Round at $38 Billion Value
title_cn: 贝索斯的物理人工智能实验室已完成融资，估值 380 亿美元
summary: Project Prometheus, the artificial intelligence lab that Amazon.com Inc. founder Jeff Bezos is leading with Google veteran Vik Bajaj, has closed a $10 billion funding round that values the company at roughly $38 billion, according to a person familiar with the situation.

title: IBM Drops After Software Sales Fail to Shake AI Concerns
title_cn: 软件销售未能动摇人工智能担忧后 IBM 股价下跌
summary: International Business Machines Corp. shares declined after the company posted quarterly sales in its software unit that were in line with estimates, failing to shake investor concerns about AI disruption to its business.

title: AI Natives Are Entering the Workforce. It’s Complicated
title_cn: 人工智能原住民正在进入劳动力市场。情况很复杂
summary: The promises and perils of the ChatGPT generation.

title: Zscaler CEO: Never Been Bigger Demand for Our Services
title_cn: Zscaler 首席执行官：对我们服务的需求从未如此之大
summary: Zscaler Chairman, CEO, & Co-Founder Jay Chaudhry discusses Anthropic's Mythos AI and the cybersecurity risks large enterprises are struggling to protect themselves from. He talks with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SAP Reports Cloud Growth That Beats Estimates in AI Push
title_cn: SAP 报告人工智能推动云增长超出预期
summary: SAP SE reported revenue growth from its cloud services that beat analysts’ estimates after Europe’s biggest software company began integrating artificial intelligence agents into the service.

title: Stocks on the Backfoot, Intel Beats Earnings | Closing Bell
title_cn: 股票下跌，英特尔业绩好于预期结束钟声
summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Raymond James CEO: Focusing on Tech, Products, AI
title_cn: Raymond James首席执行官：专注于技术、产品、人工智能
summary: Raymond James CEO Paul Shoukry discusses the health of their 'record' recruiting pipeline, and a renewed focus on technologies, products, and AI to help advisors provide more holistic advice for their clients. He talks with Katie Greifeld and ROmaine Bostick on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Is West Bengal a Bigger Test for Modi's BJP or the Opposition?
title_cn: 西孟加拉邦对莫迪的人民党还是反对党来说是更大的考验吗？
summary: India’s state election in West Bengal has emerged as a critical political test for Modi’s BJP as well as opposition parties. The outcome matters especially as the BJP seeks to expand beyond its northern strongholds, while regional parties face a high‑stakes fight for political survival. Political analyst and commentator Arati Jerath joined Haslinda Amin and Menaka Doshi on Insight with Haslinda Amin to assess what is at stake and how the vote could shape India’s political landscape. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ukraine's EU Membership Ambitions Boosted
title_cn: 乌克兰加入欧盟的野心增强
summary: European Union leaders signaled that preliminary conditions are in place for Ukraine to begin the first stage of the membership process, a boost for Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskiy’s efforts to join the bloc. At a summit in Cyprus Thursday, leaders agreed the first accession negotiations could start in the coming weeks and months, according to an EU official, who spoke on the condition of anonymity. Bloomberg's Oliver Crook reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Israel, Lebanon Set to Work on Long-Term Truce
title_cn: 以色列和黎巴嫩将致力于长期停战
summary: President Donald Trump said Israel and Lebanon will extend their ceasefire by three weeks, a move that creates space to work on a long-term deal and removes a roadblock to ending the US war with Iran. Bloomberg's Dana Khraiche reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How to Get a Deal With Iran
title_cn: 如何与伊朗达成协议
summary: Eight weeks on from the start of the US-Israel war with Iran, Wendy Sherman, architect of the 2015 nuclear deal, looks beyond the Middle East to how China and Russia are beneficiaries of the current conflict. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Wealthy Orban Acolytes Weigh Future With Riches Under Threat
title_cn: 富有的欧尔班追随者因财富受到威胁而权衡未来
summary: Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban’s abrupt expulsion is now shining a spotlight on the biggest financial beneficiaries of his regime, raising questions about who’ll remain in the country with their wealth intact.

title: China Poised to Send Pandas to US Before Trump’s Planned Visit
title_cn: 中国准备在特朗普计划访问之前向美国派遣大熊猫
summary: Beijing is apparently sending two pandas to the US, adding to signs of stabilizing ties between the nations just before President Donald Trump’s planned meeting with Xi Jinping in mid-May.

title: US-Iran Tensions Build Over Hormuz as Peace Talks Stall
title_cn: 和平谈判陷入僵局，美伊关系因霍尔木兹海峡紧张局势加剧
summary: US and Iran tensions grew over the Strait of Hormuz with both sides maintaining their blockades of the critical waterway, creating an uneasy standoff with no sign of peace talks on the horizon.

title: Trump’s Iran Pivots Spotlight Washington’s Insider Trade Threat
title_cn: 特朗普的伊朗战略重心凸显华盛顿的内幕贸易威胁
summary: In the oil market, volatility recently spiked to levels not seen since the onset of the Covid-19 pandemic. Commodities and stocks globally have whipsawed in response to every twist and turn in the Iran war: A strike, a pause, a threat to wipe out a civilization, a ceasefire; then a deal, no deal, and the prospect of one again.

title: Soldier Charged With Using Classified Data to Bet on Maduro
title_cn: 士兵被控使用机密数据押注马杜罗
summary: A US Army soldier was charged with using classified information about the timing of the capture of then-Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro to make more than $400,000 trading on Polymarket’s prediction market, the Justice Department said Thursday.

title: Trump Says He’ll Probe Banks Over Response to LA Wildfires
title_cn: 特朗普表示他将调查银行对洛杉矶野火的反应
summary: President Donald Trump said he would look into the actions of banks in their response to last year’s devastating Los Angeles wildfires following a meeting with that city’s mayor, Karen Bass.

title: Indonesia Rules Out Levies for Malacca Strait Ship Transits
title_cn: 印度尼西亚排除对马六甲海峡船舶过境征税的可能性
summary: Indonesia’s top diplomat said the country will not pursue tolls on ships passing through the Strait of Malacca, seeking to calm concerns after its finance minister raised the idea this week.

title: Xi Weaponizes Foreign Airspace in Campaign to Isolate Taiwan
title_cn: 习近平将外国空域武器化以孤立台湾
summary: President Xi Jinping has for years worked to isolate Taiwan’s leaders by blocking their diplomatic meetings and participation in global organizations. Now, he’s also looking to keep them out of the skies.

title: Trump: We Have 'Total Control' of the Strait of Hormuz | Balance of Power: Late Edition 04/23/2026
title_cn: 特朗普：我们“完全控制”霍尔木兹海峡权力平衡：最新版 04/23/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Senator Bill Hagerty (R-TN) says President Trump "has all the cards" in Iran negotiations and warns Tehran's oil storage constraints could become a near-term breaking point. Representative Raja Krishnamoorthi (D-IL) calls the conflict with Iran a "colossal disaster," warning Tehran now has a "chokehold" on global energy via the Strait of Hormuz. John Bolton, former US National Security Advisor and former US Ambassador to the United Nations, argues the US should take the time necessary to overthrow the regime in Iran.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Citadel Sends Warning Shot to NYC After Mamdani Blasts Billionaire Griffin
title_cn: 马姆达尼爆炸亿万富翁格里芬后，Citadel 向纽约市发出警告
summary: Just two months ago, Vornado Realty Trust was boasting about financial behemoth Citadel’s appetite for New York real estate, vowing to create a new icon for the Manhattan skyline.

title: Australian Gas Firms May Escape New Tax Despite Public Anger
title_cn: 尽管公众愤怒，澳大利亚天然气公司仍可能逃避新税
summary: Natural gas exporters in Australia are likely to avoid new taxes, according to local media reports, despite efforts by some lawmakers to impose higher levies and growing public anger amid the global energy crunch.

title: Trump Vows to Review Federal Workers’ Prediction Market Bets
title_cn: 特朗普发誓要审查联邦工人的预测市场赌注
summary: President Donald Trump said he would investigate federal employees placing bets on event-betting platforms, indicating concerns with prediction markets amid worries that individuals are using confidential government information to profit.

title: Trump Says the US Is Weighing Purchase of Spirit Airlines
title_cn: 特朗普称美国正在考虑购买精神航空
summary: President Donald Trump said he is considering having the US purchase Spirit Aviation Holdings Inc., saying it could be a potentially good investment for the federal government.

title: US Reduces Marijuana Restrictions in Lift to Ailing Industry
title_cn: 美国减少大麻限制，为陷入困境的行业提供帮助
summary: The US Justice Department reclassified state-regulated marijuana as a less dangerous drug, a major shift that could increase legal cannabis sales and help a struggling industry.

title: US Needs 'Patience' in Iran: John Bolton
title_cn: 约翰·博尔顿：美国在伊朗问题上需要“耐心”
summary: John Bolton, former US National Security Advisor and former US Ambassador to the United Nations, argues the US should take the time necessary to overthrow the regime in Iran. He says the damage to Iran's military and nuclear infrastructure is significant, but urges continued pressure to induce regime collapse, adding the President's original 4-6 week timeline "was never realistic." He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says He's Considering Having the US Buy Spirit Airlines
title_cn: 特朗普表示他正在考虑让美国购买精神航空
summary: President Donald Trump says the administration is considering a financial rescue package or possibly buying Spirit Airlines during remarks to reporters in the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rep. Krishnamoorthi: Iran War a 'Colossal Disaster'
title_cn: 众议员克里希纳莫提：伊朗战争是一场“巨大灾难”
summary: Representative Raja Krishnamoorthi (D-IL), a member of the House Oversight and Intelligence Committees, calls the conflict with Iran a "colossal disaster," warning Tehran now has a "chokehold" on global energy via the Strait of Hormuz. He argues the war is driving up costs for Americans - from gasoline to groceries - while hurting farmers and depleting US munitions stockpiles, and says the conflict should be ended immediately through diplomacy. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says Putin G-20 Visit Would ‘Probably Be Very Helpful’
title_cn: 特朗普称普京二十国集团访问“可能非常有帮助”
summary: US President Donald Trump said he didn’t expect Vladimir Putin to attend the Group of 20 meeting at his resort in Doral, Florida, later this year, but said the Russian leader’s participation could be useful.

title: Trump Says Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire Extended Three Weeks
title_cn: 特朗普称以色列与黎巴嫩停火期限延长三周
summary: President Donald Trump said Israel and Lebanon will extend their ceasefire by three weeks to work on a long-term deal during remarks to reporters at the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Brazil Seeks New Measures to Tame War Impact on Fuels
title_cn: 巴西寻求新措施来减轻战争对燃料的影响
summary: Brazil’s government will ask Congress for authorization to use extraordinary revenue linked to oil to cut taxes on fuel such as gasoline, diesel, ethanol and biodiesel.

title: Sen. Hagerty on Iran, Budget Talks
title_cn: 参议员哈格蒂谈伊朗和预算谈判
summary: Senator Bill Hagerty (R-TN), a member of the Senate Foreign Relations and Banking Committees, says President Trump "has all the cards" in Iran negotiations and warns Tehran's oil storage constraints could become a near-term breaking point. Hagerty also backs Kevin Warsh as Fed chair amid confirmation uncertainty, urging Democrats to advance his nomination, and expresses optimism on budget negotiations while warning DHS funding lapses could heighten security risks. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Israel and Lebanon Will Extend Their Ceasefire, Trump Says
title_cn: 特朗普称以色列和黎巴嫩将延长停火期限
summary: President Donald Trump said Israel and Lebanon will extend their ceasefire by three weeks, a move that creates space to work on a long-term deal and removes a roadblock to ending the US war with Iran.

title: Carney Says Booze Bans Can Be Resolved ‘Quickly’ if US Acts
title_cn: 卡尼表示，如果美国采取行动，禁酒令可以“迅速”解决
summary: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney says provincial liquor store bans on US alcohol can be resolved “quickly” if the Trump administration takes steps of its own to settle trade disputes.

title: Japan, Australia to Tighten Ties With Economic Deal, Kyodo Says
title_cn: 日本共同社称，日本和澳大利亚将通过经济协议加强联系
summary: Japan and Australia are set to add to their close and burgeoning defense relationship, with the two nations set to seal an economic security deal in early May, Kyodo News reported.
